description.value: Price 23,000 gp; Slot head; CL 7th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This dark purple mask is contorted and twisted, and it covers the top half of the wearerâs face in swirls of thick brocade and lace. Dappled across the maskâs swaths are dozens of twinkling amethysts. EFFECTS This mask grants the wearer the ability to transform into a poisonous gaseous form once per day, as per the spell miasmatic form. This transformation lasts for 5 minutes, at which point the wearer immediately turns back into her original form. If the wearer reverts to her original form in a space that would not normally accommodate her body, she is shunted to the nearest such open space. Activating this mask is a standard action that provokes attacks of opportunity. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 11,500 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells miasmatic form
